title: geranium viscosissimum var. incisum
intro: Geranium viscosissimum var. incisum, also known as incised sticky geranium, is a perennial plant species belonging to the geranium family that is native to western North America. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and minor infections. The health benefits of geranium viscosissimum var. incisum include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared as a salve, oil, or tincture for topical application, and its leaves can also be infused in hot water to make a soothing tea.
